title: Velvet Christmas Ribbon with Gold Glitter Merry Christmas Print, 4 Inch Wide Wired Edge, 10 Yards Long, Red Holiday Decoration for Christmas Tree Bows, Wreaths and Garland Craft Projects(red)
features: [ELEGANT DESIGN] Featuring an eye-catching glitter gold Merry Christmas print on a luxurious red velvet backdrop, this ribbon adds a sophisticated touch to any holiday decor project.
[GENEROUS SIZE] With dimensions of 4 inches in width and 10 yards in length, you'll have plenty of material to create stunnings bows or embellish trees and wreaths.
[MATERIAL] This wired ribbon is crafted from plush velvet with elegant gold trim, allowing you to easily shape it into beautiful designs that stand out in any setting.
[MULTI-PURPOSE USE] Perfect for enhancing various decorations such as Christmas trees, wreaths, or garlands; this ribbon helps you achieve a unified festive aesthetic throughout your home.
[VARIETY OF DESIGNS] Available in an array of festive colors and patterns, this ribbon ensures there's something to suit every taste and holiday theme.
description: Features: *Elegant Design: Featuring a striking glitter gold Merry Christmas print on a rich red velvet background, this ribbon adds a touch of sophistication to your holiday decorations, making it perfect for creating large bows and enhancing the festive atmosphere. *Generous Size: With a width of 4 inches and a length of 10 yards, this ribbon provides ample material for all your creative Christmas projects, you have enough to adorn trees, wreaths, and other festive displays. *Versatile Material: Crafted from luxurious velvet with a gold trim, this wired ribbon allows for easy shaping and styling, making it for IDEAL for various decoration techniques and projects. *Multi-Purpose Use: Perfect for a range of applications, this Merry Christmas ribbon is suitable for decorating Christmas trees, making wreaths, creating tree top bows, and enhancing garlands, adding a cohesive look to your holiday decor. *Variety of Designs: Available in multiple festive colors and patterns, this ribbon caters to diverse decorating preferences, you find the perfect match for your holiday themes and personal style. Specifications: Part Name:Christmas Ribbon Material:Velvet Size:4 inch wide, 10 yards long Color:As shown Package Content: 1*Christmas ribbon
